name: lokta-marp
description: Marp theme from the Lokta design system: editorial slides, self-hosted fonts embedded at render, and per-slide Mermaid theming.

scripts.example: marp --config .marprc.js --allow-local-files examples/deck.md -o examples/deck.html && marp --config .marprc.js --allow-local-files examples/deck.md -o examples/deck.pdf

author: Adam Munawar Rahman
